module.name: Search
module.param: | inputlookup groups | search NOT group="PLACEHOLDER*" | stats dc(group) as groups dc(number) as extensions | eval name="groups", filename="groups.csv" | eval contents = extensions + " extensions, " + groups + " groups" | eval website_uri="https://sideviewapps.com/documentation/cisco-cdr-reporting-analytics-administration-set-up-groups" | append [ | inputlookup cidr | search NOT site_name="Example Site" | stats count as subnets dc(site_name) as sites | eval contents=subnets + " subnets, " + sites + " sites" | eval name="sites", filename="cidr.csv" | eval website_uri = "https://sideviewapps.com/documentation/cisco-cdr-reporting-analytics-administration-set-up-sites" ] | append [ | inputlookup devices | search NOT name="PLACEHOLDER*" | stats count as devices dc(department) as departments dc(devicePool) as devicePools | eval contents= devices + " devices, " + departments + " departments, " + devicePools + " devicePools" | eval name="devices" | eval filename="devices.csv" | eval website_uri = "https://sideviewapps.com/documentation/cisco-cdr-reporting-analytics-administration-set-up-devices" ] | append [ | inputlookup clusters | search NOT group="PLACEHOLDER*" | stats count as clusters dc(group) as groups | eval contents= clusters + " clusters, " + groups + " cluster groups" | eval name="clusters" | eval filename="clusters.csv" | eval website_uri="https://sideviewapps.com/documentation/cisco-cdr-reporting-analytics-administration-set-up-clusters" ] | eval settings_uri = "setup_" + name | table name contents filename settings_uri website_uri | join filename [ | rest /servicesNS/-/cisco_cdr/data/lookup-table-files splunk_server=local | search eai:acl.app="cisco_cdr" | rename title as filename eai:data as path | table filename path ] | table name contents filename path settings_uri website_uri

module.name: HTML
module.param: This table shows the current state of the app's 4 main editable lookups.
